sigWerErrors.reason: '再' (again) and '在' (at/in) are different words and change the meaning of the sentence, leading to confusion about the action being repeated.
Omitting '我' (me/my) removes the subject/possessor, making the sentence unclear about whose name is being repeated.
'姓' (surname) and '心' (heart) are completely different in meaning, which derails the intended meaning of the sentence.
